Community Health Center Board
RUHS-Community Health Center Board
The RUHS-CHC Board of Directors is a combination of patients, community members, and staff. They are responsible for governance of the Community Health Center of at least 51% patient representation.
The CHC Board of Directors takes part in organizational planning and
actively shapes the strategic planning process for the community health centers. There are three standing committees that members participate on: Membership, Finance, and Quality. There is a Chair, Vice-Chair, Treasurer, and Secretary.
The group meets the 2nd Wednesday of the month at 11:30am.
The CHC Board meets the 2nd Wednesday of every month from 11:30am to 1:30pm.
The following link allows you to view the most current CHC Board Meeting Agendas.
Main Board & Committee Agenda
Join the Community Health Center Board
If you are interested in joining the RUHS-CHC Board of Directors or learning more about the opportunity please complete and email the
CHC Board Member Application
to
[email protected]
.
Transportation is never a barrier to involvement. Riverside University Health System is pleased to offer transportation for prospective board members within Riverside County and neighboring counties. We're committed to making partcipation accessible and convenient.
